sourceMovie.title: 21 Jump Street
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: 21 Jump Street works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: 22 Jump Street
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 21 Jump Street clicked for you, 22 Jump Street (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Beverly Hills Cop
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 21 Jump Street clicked for you, Beverly Hills Cop (1984) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after 21 Jump Street?
faq.answer: Try 22 Jump Street, Beverly Hills Cop, Rush Hour 2—each shares DNA with 21 Jump Street while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is 21 Jump Street?
faq.answer: 21 Jump Street (2012) is best described as Action, Comedy, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is 21 Jump Street part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Jump Street Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
